articles.title: Israel's Knesset recognizes IDF soldiers' PTSD as service-related disability
articles.description: The new Israeli law recognizes 'combat trauma survivors,' whom it defines as soldiers diagnosed with PTSD resulting from circumstances unique to military service. The Defense Ministry estimates that 50,000 Israelis will be treated for service-related mental health issues by 2028
articles.author: Noa Shpigel

articles.title: 'Israel isn't anti-Arab – just look at how it treats its Arab citizens'
articles.description: He praises Netanyahu and Israel's police for their treatment of Arab citizens, and argues that Israel is not an apartheid state: Professor Robert Cherry sees parallels between the integration of Israel's Arab minority and that of Jewish immigrants in America – and believes the same progress will eventually reach the cabinet table
articles.author: Ithamar Handelman-Smith

articles.title: 'The yearning for Zion was stronger than anything': Seven young Jews' epic 1932 journey
articles.description: In 1932, seven Jewish friends embarked on a four-month journey across Europe and North Africa to promote the first Maccabiah Games. They braved storms and antisemitic attacks, smuggled weapons for the Haganah – and were ultimately caught by the British in Be'er Sheva
articles.author: Ofer Aderet

articles.title: A genius encumbered by loss: A haunted Jewish poet is brought back to life
articles.author: Megan Peck Shub

articles.title: Five stubborn Jewish newspapers that have lived through it all
articles.description: Haaretz speaks to five Jewish publications around the world, from Russia and Turkey to Poland, the Netherlands and Switzerland. They print in a variety of languages, including Yiddish and even Ladino, and have survived the fall of multiple regimes
articles.author: Netta Ahituv

articles.title: Expats to flood Israel during election week for dozens of academic conferences
articles.description: According to organizers, 'the conference dates were set to leverage the fact that many Israelis will in any case be coming for the election' – but it is just as likely that the dates were intended to encourage Israeli academics based overseas to exercise their right to vote
articles.author: Lior Dattel

articles.title: Did breakoff ancient Jews really use a 'divine' 364-day calendar?
articles.description: While grimly pitted against the Romans, the Jews hated each other too, which may have led some to adopt an alternative calendar handed down to Moses, according to the apocrypha
articles.author: Ruth Schuster

articles.title: American Jews need new alliances to fight rising antisemitism
articles.description: Polls conducted among U.S. Jews show a growing sense of fear due to antisemitism. Fighting back requires a new approach, one centered on finding partners in America, not focusing exclusively on our own concerns
articles.author: Jo-Ann Mort

articles.title: New Israeli study: Children of female Holocaust survivors face higher schizophrenia risk
articles.description: An analysis of tens of thousands of Israelis born between 1964 and 1976 found increased risk among children whose mothers were older than 5 when Nazi persecution began
articles.author: Ido Efrati

articles.title: 'Elon Musk likes to think of himself as a self-made visionary. He isn't'
articles.description: Historian Noam Maggor debunks the myths of the American free market, arguing that the public has far more power than it realizes

articles.title: Sixty years ago, a Haaretz reporter visited the 'quiet border' with Gaza. His question still echoes today

articles.title: Poll: Half of Jewish Americans don't think protesting Israel is antisemitic
